errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.accountCreatedButSignInFailed: Account created but sign-in failed. Please sign in manually.
errors.general: An error occurred. Please try again.

sessionComplete.title: Session Complete
sessionComplete.description: Your simulation session has ended. We're saving your work and preparing your results.

noCoworkers.title: No Coworkers Available
noCoworkers.description: There are no coworkers configured for this scenario.

chat.startConversationDescription: {name} is a {role}. Ask questions about the project, codebase, or anything else you need help with.
chat.callToWalkThrough: Call your manager to walk through your PR

submitWorkModal.title: Ready to Submit?
submitWorkModal.description: You'll present your work to {manager} to wrap up.
submitWorkModal.uploadDescription: Upload a file to share with your manager

postDefenseModal.title: Great Work!
postDefenseModal.description: You've successfully walked through your solution.
postDefenseModal.finalizeDescription: Complete your assessment and see results

generating.title: Generating Report
generating.description: We're analyzing your performance and generating your personalized report. This may take a moment.

notReady.title: Report Not Ready
notReady.description: Your assessment report hasn't been generated yet. Click below to generate it now.

insufficientEvidence.title: Not enough to give you a full evaluation
insufficientEvidence.description: This assessment session was too short or didn't capture enough of your work for us to evaluate you on all dimensions. Below is a summary of what was observed.

leftPanel.title: NOT A
leftPanel.description: This is a simulation of real work. You'll collaborate with AI teammates, use your favorite tools, and solve actual problems.

teammates.descriptionEnd: via chat. They'll respond just like real colleagues.

recording.descriptionEnd: . We assess how you work, not just the end result.

aiTools.descriptionEnd: you want. Copilot, ChatGPT, Claude — whatever helps you work best.

tip.label: Tip:
tip.text: Don't hesitate to reach out to your teammates for clarification. That's exactly what we want to see!

leftPanel.title: YOUR
leftPanel.description: Use your own IDE, browser, terminal — everything on your computer. We record your screen and assess how you actually work.

ownComputer.descriptionEnd: Use your IDE, terminal, browser, repos — any tool you normally use.

workOutside.strong: You're expected to work outside SkillVee.
workOutside.descriptionEnd: Write code in VS Code, look things up, use whatever workflow you prefer.

screenRecord.strong: We record your screen the whole time
screenRecord.descriptionEnd: — everything you do is part of your assessment.

comeBack.strong: Come back to SkillVee to chat
comeBack.descriptionEnd: with your manager and teammates whenever you need to.

leftPanel.title: TAKE
leftPanel.description: Work at your natural pace. There's no bonus for finishing fast — just do your best work.

timing.descriptionStart: This simulation is designed to take about

quietSpot.descriptionEnd: with no distractions. Treat this like a focused block of work.

internet.descriptionEnd: If you lose connection, you can rejoin and continue where you left off.

continuous.descriptionEnd: Once you start, work through to completion in one sitting.

reminder.label: Remember:
reminder.text: Work at your natural pace. There's no bonus for rushing — we want to see how you normally work.

leftPanel.title: READY.
leftPanel.description: Your environment is ready. Let's begin.

rightPanel.title: Launch Simulation

description.start: You'll receive a task from your manager. The context is
description.end: — part of the assessment is seeing how you ask questions and gather requirements.

rightPanel.consent: By continuing, you agree to screen and webcam recording during this assessment.

errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.

header.subtitle: Track your simulations and review your results

emptyState.title: No assessments yet
emptyState.description: You'll see your assessments here once a recruiter invites you to a simulation. Check your email for invite links.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again, and if the problem persists, contact support.

hero.subtitle: {companyName} is looking for someone to join their team. Experience a day in the role before you commit.

auth.consent: By signing up, you agree to screen and webcam recording and our <terms>Terms</terms> & <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>

errors.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.

empty.title: No assessments yet
empty.description: Create a simulation and invite candidates to see their assessment results here.

errors.genericError: An error occurred while fetching data

new.title: Create a New Simulation
new.subtitle: Start with a job description or answer a few questions

pasteJD.title: Paste a Job Description
pasteJD.subtitle: Recommended — we'll extract everything automatically
pasteJD.placeholder:
Paste your job description here...

Example:
Senior Frontend Engineer at Acme Corp

We're looking for an experienced frontend developer to join our team. You'll be working on our React-based dashboard, building new features for our analytics platform...

errors.notEnoughInfo: We couldn't extract enough details. Please fill in the missing fields below.

guided.title: Tell Us About Your Role
guided.subtitle: Answer a few questions to create your simulation
guided.companyDescriptionPlaceholder: e.g., We're a fintech startup building payment infrastructure for small businesses
guided.techStack: What technologies does this role use?
guided.archetypeNote: Scoring expectations will be adjusted for this role — different dimensions will have different expected scores based on seniority.

generating.title: Building your simulation
steps: Calibrating difficulty to match role level...

preview.title: Confirm Your Simulation
preview.subtitle: Pick a challenge, then review the auto-generated details
preview.juniorDesc: 0-2 years — can do the work with guidance, learning-focused
preview.seniorDesc: 5-8 years — works independently, mentors others, owns systems
preview.staffDesc: 8+ years — sets technical direction, cross-team impact
preview.selectChallenge: Select the challenge candidates will work on during the assessment
preview.selectChallengeAndArchetype: Select a challenge and role archetype to continue
preview.selectArchetypeOnly: Select a role archetype to continue
preview.scoringNote: Scoring expectations will vary by dimension for this role

teamSheet.title: Team Members
teamSheet.description: AI-generated team that will interact with the candidate

candidateExperienceSheet.title: Candidate Experience
candidateExperienceSheet.description: This is what candidates will see when they start the simulation

cloneModal.title: Clone to Another Language
cloneModal.description: Create a copy of this simulation in another language. The scenario content (task, team, resources) will be regenerated in the selected language.
